title: Earthy Crisp Southern Tofu Curry
description: A single‑pot southern‑Thai style curry with crinkly tofu, rosemary, and shio‑koji that delivers earthy flavors and a satisfying crisp finish.
instructions: Press tofu for 15 minutes to remove excess moisture, then cut into 2 cm cubes.
Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering, then add the tofu and fry until golden and crisp, about 8 minutes.
Stir in the red curry paste and fresh rosemary, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and water, then bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add shio‑koji, salt, and lime juice, stirring until well combined.
Add diced carrot, sliced bell pepper, and snow peas, letting them cook until just tender, about 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning, adding more shio‑koji or salt if needed.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the curry rest for 3 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve hot over steamed jasmine rice or cauliflower rice, garnished with fresh rosemary sprigs.
Optional: Drizzle a little extra virgin olive oil before serving for added sheen.
